name: Hyperbrowser
description: Cloud browser infrastructure for AI agents with session management, captcha solving and stealth mode.

seo.title: Hyperbrowser — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Hyperbrowser: Cloud browser infrastructure for AI agents with session management, captcha solving and stealth mode.

when_to_use: Running AI-controlled browsers at scale for research agents
Scraping JavaScript-heavy sites with AI navigation handling
Building multi-page data extraction workflows via AI browsing
Deploying parallel browser sessions for AI task automation

pros: Purpose-built for AI agent browsing workloads
Handles captchas and stealth out of the box
cons: Overlaps heavily with Browserbase and Browserless
Pricing adds up for long agent sessions
Legal grey zone around stealth and captcha
review.verdict: Useful infra if you're building agents that live in a real browser at scale.
review.best_for: Teams building web automation and scraping agents in production
review.not_for: Simple deterministic scraping where Playwright solo is cheaper
